input.command:
python3 -c "
import re

with open('/tmp/skilljar.html', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find coursebox sections - look for anchor tags with course hrefs
# Pattern: <a href=\"/page/...\" ... data-course=\"slug\"
link_pattern = r'<a[^>]*href=\"(/page/[^\"]+)\"[^>]*data-course=\"([^\"]+)\"'
matches = re.findall(link_pattern, content)
for href, slug in matches:
    print(f'https://anthropic.skilljar.com{href}  [{slug}]')
    
if not matches:
    # Try alternate pattern
    link_pattern = r'<a[^>]*data-course=\"([^\"]+)\"[^>]*href=\"([^\"]+)\"'
    matches = re.findall(link_pattern, content)
    for slug, href in matches:
        print(f'{href}  [{slug}]')
"

python3 -c "
import re

with open('/tmp/skilljar.html', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find all <a> tags and their attributes
a_tags = re.findall(r'<a\s[^>]*>', content)
for tag in a_tags:
    if 'data-course=' in tag and 'data-course=\"\"' not in tag:
        href = re.search(r'href=\"([^\"]+)\"', tag)
        course = re.search(r'data-course=\"([^\"]+)\"', tag)
        if href and course:
            print(f'{course.group(1)}: {href.group(1)}')
" | sort -u

courses = {}

    if len(parts) >= 5:
        course = parts[4]  
        if course not in courses:
            courses[course] = []
        courses[course].append(url)

for course, urls in sorted(courses.items()):
    print(f'{course}: {len(urls)} images')
"
